Title: Law Offices of Stephen Abraham - Virtual box bootup disk corrupted - URGENT
Notes:
Ticket Summary – ESXi Setup & VM Validation (Working with Gurdeep)

  • Connected with the user via Microsoft Teams call to review requirements and provide live assistance.

  • Verified required data and resources in Nimbus prior to deployment.

  • Confirmed the necessary container and installation files were available and valid.

  • Created a Rufus bootable USB drive for ESXi installation.

  • Guided the user through downloading and configuring VMware ESXi 6.5.

  • Assisted with ESXi installation and initial host configuration.

  • Registered the virtual machine successfully on the ESXi host.

  • Verified VM network configuration, confirmed IP assignment, and validated connectivity.

  • Accessed the VM to confirm it is operational and functioning as expected.

  • Worked collaboratively with Gurdeep throughout the task to ensure successful completion.

Title: Law Offices of Stephen Abraham - Virtual box bootup disk corrupted - URGENT
Notes: I connected with the user via Microsoft Teams to review the ESXi setup requirements and provide live assistance. Before starting, I verified the necessary data and resources in Synology to ensure everything was ready for deployment and confirmed that the required container and installation files were valid. I then created a Rufus bootable USB drive for the ESXi installation and guided the user through downloading and configuring VMware ESXi 6.5 on the Dell physical server. After assisting with the ESXi installation and initial host configuration, I successfully registered the virtual machine on the ESXi host, verified the VM network configuration, confirmed IP assignment, and validated connectivity. I accessed the VM to ensure it was operational and functioning as expected. Throughout the process, I worked collaboratively with Parveen to ensure smooth execution. Finally, I retrieved the ESXi license key and applied it to the ESXi host. The user mentioned that he would continue with the remaining setup after the call.
